zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanna d'Eyncourt於1215年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾霍爾德內斯時，她的父親Sir Ralph Deincourt35歲，母親Eleanor Fleming45歲。她於1243年與Saire de Sutton在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1309年在英國諾廷加姆爾塞頓 奧 特倫特享年94歲。

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Joanna d'Eyncourt was born in 1215, in Holderness, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Ralph Deincourt, was 35 and her mother, Eleanor Fleming, was 45. She married Saire de Sutton in 1243, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1309, in Sutton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 94.

Elle a épousé Saire de Sutton en 1243, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. ja.lifeSummary: Joanna d'Eyncourtが1215年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアホールデルネスで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Deincourtは35歳，母Eleanor Flemingは45歳であった。1243年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドでSaire de Suttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1309年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスットオン オン トレントで94歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanna d'Eyncourt(이)가 1215년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 홀더네스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Deincourt(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Fleming(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 1243년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 Saire de Sutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1309년 영국 노틴그함실르 수턴  트렌트에서 94세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanna d'Eyncourt родилась в 1215 г. в местности холдирнесс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph Deincourt было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Fleming, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Saire de Sutton в 1243 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1309 г. в местности суттон он трент, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 94 лет.
